violations.text: The 3-bay sink was observed to be in poor repair (3rd bay leaking from bottom pipe). A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. Ware-washing procedures reviewed with staff at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Donuts, protein balls, and yogurt packaged in the food establishment are lacking the proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Person in charge given label handouts at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
Establishment is lacking allergen awareness statement. Allergy poster given to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

Dishes and utensils were observed drying on rack over hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
Establishment is lacking handwashing signage in the restrooms. A sign or poster is required to remind food employees to wash their hands. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

Parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023
